examples: The Councillor boldly declared the time of King Hans to be the noblest and the most happy period.
Oh, he was the noblest man that ever was.
In any case, cash gifts can weaken the resolve of even the noblest person.
Meanwhile, the public can decide whether the lawyers at Paul, Weiss who are volunteering at Guantanamo are an example of the legal profession's noblest traditions.
It may not be the noblest part of our nature, but taking a financial bath is a little more palatable when you can look around and see your neighbors got wet, too.
